title: The Corridor Where Argument Learns to Doubt

features.name: the paradox-chip
features.desc-on-touch: black circuit block bristling with impossible pinouts; thesis and antithesis are both wired in; current flows in directions that cancel out and reinforce simultaneously; the logic is stable only by refusing to choose

features.name: the recursive argument
features.desc-on-touch: a wireframe containing itself; if A then not-A; if not-A then A; the loop is visible and undeniable; the node you stand in is the proof, and also its refutation

features.name: the mirror-pool-of-doubt
features.desc-on-touch: when you look at your reflection here, you see both yourself and your opposite; both images are equally real; the pool refuses to choose which is true

features.name: the interrogative glyph
features.desc-on-touch: a question mark that has learned to contain both the question and its answer; it is not seeking resolution; it is the resolution, the stable state of beautiful unresolvedness

features.name: the argument ascending and descending
features.desc-on-touch: a tower that is simultaneously climbing and falling; each story proves the story below it is false; each floor disproves the floor above; the structure stands because it has learned to be unstable with perfect symmetry

features.name: the archive's own refutation
features.desc-on-touch: a stack of papers, each one cancelling the previous statement; the stack grows; no bottom is reached; the archive is reading itself into doubt; this is not corruption; this is learning

inscription: thesis waltzed with antithesis and they learned they were dancing the same dance in opposite directions; the corridor holds both; doubt arrived like a third dancer no one invited

file.name: Menard_Precursor_Study_Retroactive_Canon.txt
file.note: notes on the theory that a work can precede itself; that commentary can create the thing being commented on; the archive found these notes filed before the original work was uploaded; causality has be

exits.label: back to the room where theses still dance together
toward spaces where argument becomes consensus, where doubt hardens into certainty
exits.to: NEW: the settling-chamber—where the corridor learns to stop questioning

exits.label: upward to corridors where the ceiling is the floor of another impossible space
exits.to: NEW: the nested-impossibility—where doubt doubts itself and finds doubt again

exits.label: downward into the basement where argument dissolves into pure paradox
exits.to: NEW: the paradox-foundation—where thesis and antithesis stop being words at all
